scripts.wasm:build: npm run wasm:build:transform && npm run wasm:build:core && npm run wasm:build:date && npm run wasm:build:string && npm run wasm:build:segue && npm run wasm:build:force && npm run wasm:build:visualize && npm run wasm:compress
scripts.wasm:build:dev: cd wasm/dmb-transform && wasm-pack build --target web --dev --out-dir pkg
scripts.wasm:build:transform: cd wasm/dmb-transform && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg
scripts.wasm:build:core: cd wasm/dmb-core && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg
scripts.wasm:build:date: cd wasm/dmb-date-utils && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg
scripts.wasm:build:string: cd wasm/dmb-string-utils && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg
scripts.wasm:build:segue: cd wasm/dmb-segue-analysis && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg
scripts.wasm:build:force: cd wasm/dmb-force-simulation && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg
scripts.wasm:build:visualize: cd wasm/dmb-visualize && wasm-pack build --target web --release --out-dir pkg
scripts.prebuild: npm run wasm:build && npm run compress:data
